# Test-only deps in `beetkeeper-resolve` so mypy (`pants check`, run per-resolve) can resolve test imports;
# they never ship in the wheels. The pytest duplication with `tools-resolve` is expected, not removable.

pytest-mock>=3.15.1
pytest-socket>=0.8.0
pytest-xdist>=3.8.0
ruamel.yaml>=0.19.1
